headline: Episode 8
summary: Headlines include Greensill Capital, Third Point LLC, Chinese politics & policy and EU business regulation
body_text:
This edition features these stories from ft.com

David Cameron lobbied Tory associate at Lloyds Bank to rescue Greensill deal

Daniel Loeb’s Third Point makes $300m profit from Rivian IPO

Tennis star’s assault claim forces west to rethink its China approach

EU seeks more independence for bank regulators after Wirecard scandal
